Task: Perform external review of `/Users/apple/hivemind-plugin/docs/CHAIN-BRIDGE-ARCHITECTURE.md`.
Scope: Review only this file for requirement compliance; do not modify files.
Requirements to validate:
- YAML frontmatter present and coherent.
- Exactly 9 top-level sections (`##` headings).

- Each of 9 sections includes at least one fenced text diagram.
- Section 8 grounds validation details in actual sync-assets code/test behavior.

Return format:
1) verdict: approved | rejected
2) findings: up to 10 bullets

Success metric: clear approval/rejection with evidence references.
